allow: Bash(node -e "const m = require\('pdf-parse'\); console.log\('type:', typeof m, 'keys:', Object.keys\(m\).slice\(0,8\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\('pdf-parse'\); const p = new PDFParse\({ data: require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('content-library/aqa/assessments/cpu_architecture_set1.pdf'\) }\); p.getText\(\).then\(r => console.log\('text len:', r.text ? r.text.length : 'no text', 'keys:', Object.keys\(r\)\)\);")

Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\('pdf-parse'\); new PDFParse\({ data: require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('content-library/aqa/assessments/cpu_architecture_set1.pdf'\) }\).getText\(\).then\(r => console.log\(r.text.slice\(0, 1500\)\)\)")

Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\('pdf-parse'\); new PDFParse\({ data: require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('content-library/aqa/assessments/cpu_architecture_set1.pdf'\) }\).getText\(\).then\(r => { console.log\('LEN:', r.text.length\); console.log\('---TAIL---'\); console.log\(r.text.slice\(-2500\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\('pdf-parse'\); new PDFParse\({ data: require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('content-library/ocr/longanswer/algorithms_searching_sorting/standard_full.pdf'\) }\).getText\(\).then\(r => { console.log\('LEN:', r.text.length\); console.log\('---HEAD---'\); console.log\(r.text.slice\(0, 2000\)\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\('pdf-parse'\); new PDFParse\({ data: require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('content-library/ocr/longanswer/algorithms_searching_sorting/standard_full.pdf'\) }\).getText\(\).then\(r => { const m = r.text.match\(/Question \\d+\\/\\d+/g\); console.log\('Headings:', m\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\('pdf-parse'\); new PDFParse\({ data: require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('content-library/ocr/longanswer/algorithms_searching_sorting/standard_full.pdf'\) }\).getText\(\).then\(r => { const lines = r.text.split\('\\n'\); console.log\('total lines:', lines.length\); console.log\('Question count:', \(r.text.match\(/Task \\\(\\d+ marks?\\\)/g\) || []\).length\); console.log\('Example Answer count:', \(r.text.match\(/Example Answer/g\) || []\).length\); console.log\('Levels of response:', \(r.text.match\(/Levels of response/g\) || []\).length\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\('pdf-parse'\); new PDFParse\({ data: require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('content-library/ocr/longanswer/algorithms_searching_sorting/standard_full.pdf'\) }\).getText\(\).then\(r => { require\('fs'\).writeFileSync\('/tmp/q1_standard.txt', r.text\); console.log\('wrote standard:', r.text.length, 'chars'\); }\)")

Bash(node -e "const { PDFParse } = require\('pdf-parse'\); new PDFParse\({ data: require\('fs'\).readFileSync\('content-library/ocr/longanswer/algorithms_searching_sorting/extension_full.pdf'\) }\).getText\(\).then\(r => { require\('fs'\).writeFileSync\('/tmp/q1_extension.txt', r.text\); console.log\('wrote extension:', r.text.length, 'chars'\); }\)")
